headline: NXP’s New i.MX 93W Highlights Edge AI Potential And Valuation Gap
summary: NXP Semiconductors (NasdaqGS:NXPI) announced the i.MX 93W applications processor, described as the industry's first chip to combine AI neural processing with secure tri radio wireless connectivity. The single chip is designed to replace dozens of discrete components and support faster deployment of physical AI use cases across multiple industries. The launch targets AI and IoT edge devices, with an emphasis on simplifying regulatory compliance and development timelines. NXP Semiconductors,...
